history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot of a young woman's face, focusing on her eyes and lips. She has long, dark hair that frames her face. Her eyes are adorned with dramatic, voluminous false eyelashes and subtle glittery eyeshadow. Her lips are full, plump, and painted with a soft pink lipstick. There are visible streaks of what appear to be tears or glitter running down her cheeks, catching the light. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, with a warm, yellowish glow coming from above and to the right, creating highlights on her skin and emphasizing the glistening tears. The overall mood is melancholic, vulnerable, and artistic, with a touch of glamour. The background is dark and out of focus, with some textures suggesting a wall or fabric. The style is reminiscent of moody, artistic portrait photography with a hint of ethereal beauty.
